properties.name: 台江水日：海佃國小至烏山頭紀念園區（新聞路線圖校正版）
properties.description: Trimmed from uploaded GPS coordinates: starts at 海佃國小, follows MSTW03–07/news-map-like mainline, removes obvious out-and-back detours, passes 烏山頭水庫, and connects into 八田與一紀念園區.
